title: trasus distans
intro: Trasus distans, also known as the "Far-Off or Distant Tragus", is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Trasus distans include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Trasus distans can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant's essential oil, which can be applied topically or used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
